title: Armed And Ready - VPB/PBJ addon
description: PvP and survival-focused gun pack addon for VPB/PBJ
body:
Survival-focused gun pack with a huge variety of guns and gun modules for every possible need.
**Guns**
Currently there's over 100 weapons - pistols, shotguns, rifles and machineguns - everything carefully balanced to make battles quick and deadly. And no typical videogame nonsence like "automatic firearms of same caliber and barrel length as semi-auto ones deals less damage"!

**Attachments**
Tarkov-alike attachment system with swappable barrels, stocks, pistol grips, handguards, mags - on top of the simple "grip - scope - muzzle" platform. 
Also, check out Hornet modular rifle, with it's interchangeable barrels and calibers!

**Ammunition**
Every ammunition falls into one of types: "Short", "Long", "Auto" (and so on) and represents several real world rounds - for example, 9x19 Para and 9x18 Makarov rounds set to one caliber - 9mm Short.

**Also features:**
- Melee weapons and melee-allowing attachments, such as bayonets and stocks (too weird and probably will be removed), all with custom animations!
- Unique weapons and attachments, obtainable only through looting and exploring! (loot table integration was broken, so i removed it from this version, but it will be back)
